g.text: Uses system parameters for progress tracking
Continue until all probation customers processed
- false: CustProbations is empty = all done
- Ready for next job run (starts from LastCustID)
3. Next batch starts from last position
- Return last processed IDs for next batch
JOIN CustomerTransaction t ON c.CustID = t.CustID
AND t.TransactionDate BETWEEN c.ProbationStartDate AND NOW()
